title.zh: 02 浏览器页面巡检与截图证据
title.en: 02 Browser Page Review with Screenshot Evidence

observation.zh: 主标题、侧栏和任务状态面板可见
observation.en: Main heading, sidebar, and task status panel are visible

observation.zh: 无横向滚动，导航按钮可展开
observation.en: No horizontal scrolling; nav button expands

observation.zh: 表格在手机端可横向滚动，未撑破页面
observation.en: Table scrolls horizontally on mobile without breaking the page

observation.zh: 无 JavaScript 错误，资源均返回 200

zh: 浏览器桌面视口：1440x1000，截图 home-desktop-1440.png。
浏览器手机视口：390x900，检查 document.documentElement.scrollWidth 是否大于 window.innerWidth。
en: Browser mobile viewport: 390x900, check whether document.documentElement.scrollWidth is greater than window.innerWidth.

zh: 页面可交付，但手机端表格滚动提示建议补强。
截图只覆盖指定路径，未点击写入型控件。
后续改版时保留同一组视口，避免截图不可比。
en: The page is deliverable, but the mobile table scroll cue should be improved.
Screenshots cover only the specified path; write actions were not clicked.
Keep the same viewports in later redesigns so screenshots remain comparable.

trigger.zh: 本地页面即将交付，需要确认桌面、手机、控制台和表格区域没有阻断问题。
trigger.en: A local page was close to delivery and needed desktop, mobile, console, and table checks.

firstSignal.zh: 手机截图里表格可滚动，但缺少明显滚动提示。
firstSignal.en: The mobile screenshot showed the table could scroll, but the scroll cue was weak.

doneSignal.zh: 页面级横向溢出为 false，控制台错误为 0，P0 问题为 0。
doneSignal.en: Page-level horizontal overflow was false, console errors were 0, and P0 issues were 0.
